Title: Reset
Actors: Jingting Bai, Jinmai Zhao, Yijun Liu
Plot: Game architect "Xiao Heyun" and "Li Shiqing", a college student, came back from the dead after the bus explosion. During the time period of the bus accident, they continued to experience a time cycle, from getting off the bus to saving themselves to breaking the barriers and fighting side by side, trying to prevent the explosion and find the truth.
